title: Myanmar Rerank Rules Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating rerank_rules.yaml - Data-driven suggestion reranking, promotion, and injection rules

simple_injections.description: Direct error-to-target mappings for suggestion injection

contextual_promotions.description: Context-aware promotions with sentence cues and fallback defaults

semantic_context_injections.description: Injections requiring all sentence cues to be present (AND logic)

disambiguation_promotions.description: Promotions based on existing suggestion list contents

error_type_injections.description: Injections conditioned on a specific error type

delete_on_error_type.description: Error types that receive empty-string injection (mark for deletion)

surface_rewrites.description: Fix malformed suggestions in the suggestion list

post_normalizers.description: Late-stage fixes that run after all other rules

sequential_particle_noun_exclusions.description: Noun stems that exclude sequential particle promotion

school_context_tail_cues.description: Tail cues for school context promotion

second_person_pronouns.description: Second-person pronouns for tense_mismatch modal question detection

targeted_top1_hints.description: Error text to ordered target list mappings for top-1 recovery

parametric_rules.description: Algorithmic rules parameterized via YAML with template executors

match_mode.description: How to match the error text (default: exact)

no_suggestions.description: Only inject when no existing suggestions are present

error_type.description: Restrict injection to this error type

contextual_promotion_entry.description: Context-aware promotion with sentence cues and a default fallback

cues.description: Ordered list of context cues (first match wins)

default_target.description: Fallback target when no cue matches

default_rule_id.description: Rule ID for the default target

promote_if_needed.description: Whether to promote the target if already in suggestions

contextual_cue.description: A sentence context cue for contextual promotions

sentence_contains.description: Any of these must be present in the sentence (OR logic)

sentence_contains_all.description: All of these must be present in the sentence (AND logic)

target.description: Target suggestion when this cue matches

semantic_context_injection_entry.description: Injection requiring all sentence cues (AND logic), for semantic_error type

sentence_requires_all.description: All of these must be present in the sentence

disambiguation_promotion_entry.description: Promotion or injection based on existing suggestion list contents

target.description: Target suggestion to promote or inject

action.description: Whether to promote existing or inject new (default: promote)

suggestion_contains.description: Target must be present in suggestions (exact match)

suggestion_contains_any.description: Any of these must be present in suggestions

suggestion_contains_all.description: All of these must be present in suggestions

suggestion_prefix.description: Any suggestion must start with this prefix

suggestion_exact.description: Suggestions list must equal this exactly

top1_was.description: Top-1 suggestion before this rule was this value

error_type_injection_entry.description: Injection conditioned on matching a specific error type

error_type.description: Error type that must match for this rule

match_mode.description: How to match the error text (default: exact)

sentence_contains.description: Any of these must be present in the sentence (OR logic)

sentence_contains_all.description: All of these must be present in the sentence (AND logic)

token_contains.description: Token at error position must contain this text

suggestion_exact.description: Suggestions list must equal this exactly

no_suggestions.description: Only inject when no existing suggestions are present

delete_on_error_type_entry.description: Error type that gets empty-string injection when no suggestions exist

error_type.description: Error type to match for deletion

surface_rewrite_entry.description: Fix malformed suggestion text in the suggestion list

trigger_error.description: Error text that triggers this rewrite

parametric_rule_entry.description: Algorithmic rule parameterized via YAML with a template executor

enabled.description: Whether this rule is active (default: true)

params.description: Template-specific parameters (validated by the template function)

targeted_top1_hint_entry.description: Error text to ordered target list for top-1 recovery via promotion or morpheme injection

error.description: Error text to match (normalized at load time)

targets.description: Ordered list of target suggestions to try

post_normalizer_entry.description: Late-stage fix that runs after all other rerank rules

action.description: Whether to promote existing or inject new

top1_was.description: Only apply if top-1 was this value before
